lines.english: In each and every home, devotional worship was performed by the people, according to the Guru's Teachings.
In the Golden Age of Sat Yuga, everyone spoke the Truth.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Raamkalee, Third Mehl, First House:
In that Golden Age, Dharma had four feet.
In all four ages, the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is glory and greatness.
How rare are those people who, as Gurmukh, contemplate this and understand. ||1||
In the Silver Age of Traytaa Yuga, one leg was removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਾਗੈ ਸੋ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਕੋਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ji naam laagai so mukat hovai gur bin naam na paavai koee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: One who holds tight to the Naam is liberated; without the Guru, no one obtains the Naam. ||1||Pause||
Hypocrisy became prevalent, and people thought that the Lord was far away.
The Gurmukhs still understood and realized;
the Naam abided deep within them, and they were at peace. ||2||
In this Brass Age, Dharma was left with only two feet.
In the Brass Age of Dwaapur Yuga, duality and double-mindedness arose.
Deluded by doubt, they knew duality.
Those who became Gurmukh implanted the Naam deep within. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਪੈਰਿ ਚਲੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਵਧਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: eik pair chalai maaeaa mohu vadhaae |
lines.english: It walks on just one foot; love and emotional attachment to Maya have increased.
In the Iron Age of Kali Yuga, Dharma was left with only one power.
If someone meets the True Guru, he is saved, through the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||4||
Love and emotional attachment to Maya bring total darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਸਾਚਾ ਏਕੋ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh jug meh saachaa eko soee |
lines.english: Throughout the ages, there is only the One True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਨਹੀ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh meh sach doojaa nahee koee |
lines.english: Among all, is the True Lord; there is no other at all.
How rare are those, who as Gurmukh, chant the Naam. ||5||
Praising the True Lord, true peace is attained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਊਤਮੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh jug meh naam aootam hoee |
lines.english: Throughout all the ages, the Naam is the ultimate, the most sublime.
How rare are those, who as Gurmukh, understand this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ਭਗਤੁ ਜਨੁ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: har naam dhiaae bhagat jan soee |
lines.english: One who meditates on the Lord's Name is a humble devotee.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਹੋਈ ॥੬॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jug jug naam vaddiaaee hoee |6|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, in each and every age, the Naam is glory and greatness. ||6||1||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Raamkalee, Fourth Mehl, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਵਡਭਾਗ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: je vaddabhaag hoveh vaddabhaagee taa har har naam dhiaavai |
lines.english: If someone is very fortunate, and is blessed with great high destiny, then he meditates on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਨਾਮੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam japat naame sukh paavai har naame naam samaavai |1|
lines.english: Chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, he finds peace, and merges in the Naam. ||1||
O mortal, as Gurmukh, worship the Lord in devotion forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੈ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai pragaas hovai liv laagai guramat har har naam samaanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Your heart shall be illumined; through the Guru's Teachings, lovingly attune yourself to the Lord. You shall merge in the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਵਡਭਾਗੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਵਡ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਤਿਨਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਕਢਿ ਕਢਿ ਲੀਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jis vaddabhaag hovai vadd masatak tin guramat kadt kadt leea |2|
lines.english: one who has good fortune and great destiny inscribed upon his forehead, digs them out, by following the Guru's Teachings. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੀਰਾ ਰਤਨ ਜਵੇਹਰ ਮਾਣਕ ਬਹੁ ਸਾਗਰ ਭਰਪੂਰੁ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: heeraa ratan javehar maanak bahu saagar bharapoor keea |
lines.english: The Great Giver is filled with diamonds, emeralds, rubies and pearls;

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਨੁ ਜਵੇਹਰੁ ਲਾਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਕਾਢਿ ਤਲੀ ਦਿਖਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ratan javehar laal har naamaa gur kaadt talee dikhalaaeaa |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is the jewel, the emerald, the ruby; digging it out, the Guru has placed it in your palm.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਾ ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: masatak bhaag hovai dhur likhiaa taa satagur sevaa laae |
lines.english: If such pre-ordained destiny is written upon one's forehead, then the True Guru enjoins him to serve Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਗਹੀਣ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਨਹੀ ਲੀਆ ਤ੍ਰਿਣ ਓਲੈ ਲਾਖੁ ਛਪਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bhaagaheen manamukh nahee leea trin olai laakh chhapaaeaa |3|
lines.english: The unfortunate, self-willed manmukh does not obtain it; this priceless jewel remains hidden behind a curtain of straw. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਤਨ ਜਵੇਹਰ ਪਾਵੈ ਧਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਏ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak ratan javehar paavai dhan dhan guramat har paae |4|1|
lines.english: O Nanak, then he obtains the jewel, the gem; blessed, blessed is that one who follows the Guru's Teachings, and finds the Lord. ||4||1||
Raamkalee, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਜਨਾ ਮਿਲਿ ਭਇਆ ਅਨੰਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਨੀਕੀ ਕਥਾ ਸੁਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: raam janaa mil bheaa anandaa har neekee kathaa sunaae |
lines.english: Meeting with the humble servants of the Lord, I am in ecstasy; they preach the sublime sermon of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਗਈ ਸਭ ਨੀਕਲਿ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਬੁਧਿ ਪਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: duramat mail gee sabh neekal satasangat mil budh paae |1|
lines.english: The filth of evil-mindedness is totally washed away; joining the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, one is blessed with understanding. ||1||
